'''goshagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yuzh|yuzh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yuzh|yuzh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| goshagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:goshagithi|goshagithi]] || [[word:goshagiji|goshagiji]] || [[word:goshagishi|goshagishi]] || [[word:goshagiki|goshagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:goshaguthuthu|goshaguthuthu]] || [[word:goshagujuju|goshagujuju]] || [[word:goshagushushu|goshagushushu]] || [[word:goshagukuku|goshagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:goshaguthu|goshaguthu]] || [[word:goshaguju|goshaguju]] || [[word:goshagushu|goshagushu]] || [[word:goshaguku|goshaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:goshagufthuf|goshagufthuf]] || [[word:goshagufjuf|goshagufjuf]] || [[word:goshagufshuf|goshagufshuf]] || [[word:goshagufkuf|goshagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:goshagethe|goshagethe]] || [[word:goshageje|goshageje]] || [[word:goshageshe|goshageshe]] || [[word:goshageke|goshageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:goshagothotho|goshagothotho]] || [[word:goshagojojo|goshagojojo]] || [[word:goshagoshosho|goshagoshosho]] || [[word:goshagokoko|goshagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:goshagotho|goshagotho]] || [[word:goshagojo|goshagojo]] || [[word:goshagosho|goshagosho]] || [[word:goshagoko|goshagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:goshagofthof|goshagofthof]] || [[word:goshagofjof|goshagofjof]] || [[word:goshagofshof|goshagofshof]] || [[word:goshagofkof|goshagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:goshagïfthïf|goshagïfthïf]] || [[word:goshagïfjïf|goshagïfjïf]] || [[word:goshagïfshïf|goshagïfshïf]] || [[word:goshagïfkïf|goshagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:goshagïfthïfthïf|goshagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:goshagïfjïfjïf|goshagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:goshagïfshïfshïf|goshagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:goshagïfkïfkïf|goshagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:goshagïfthïf|goshagïfthïf]] || [[word:goshagïfjïf|goshagïfjïf]] || [[word:goshagïfshïf|goshagïfshïf]] || [[word:goshagïfkïf|goshagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:goshagïfthïf|goshagïfthïf]] || [[word:goshagïfjïf|goshagïfjïf]] || [[word:goshagïfshïf|goshagïfshïf]] || [[word:goshagïfkïf|goshagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:goshagæthæ|goshagæthæ]] || [[word:goshagæjæ|goshagæjæ]] || [[word:goshagæshæ|goshagæshæ]] || [[word:goshagækæ|goshagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:goshagathatha|goshagathatha]] || [[word:goshagajaja|goshagajaja]] || [[word:goshagashasha|goshagashasha]] || [[word:goshagakaka|goshagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:goshagatha|goshagatha]] || [[word:goshagaja|goshagaja]] || [[word:goshagasha|goshagasha]] || [[word:goshagaka|goshagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:goshagafthaf|goshagafthaf]] || [[word:goshagafjaf|goshagafjaf]] || [[word:goshagafshaf|goshagafshaf]] || [[word:goshagafkaf|goshagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:goshagasha|goshagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:goshagshësha|goshagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagrosha|goshagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagmusha|goshagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagyasha|goshagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogoshagnkshësha|gogoshagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogoshagnkrosha|gogoshagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogoshagnkmusha|gogoshagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogoshagnkyasha|gogoshagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:goshashagasha|goshashagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:goshashagshësha|goshashagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashagrosha|goshashagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashagmusha|goshashagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashagyasha|goshashagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogoshashagnkshësha|gogoshashagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogoshashagnkrosha|gogoshashagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogoshashagnkmusha|gogoshashagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogoshashagnkyasha|gogoshashagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:geshægasha|geshægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:geshægshësha|geshægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:geshægrosha|geshægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:geshægmusha|geshægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:geshægyasha|geshægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogeshægnkshësha|gogeshægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogeshægnkrosha|gogeshægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogeshægnkmusha|gogeshægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogeshægnkyasha|gogeshægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:goshfagasha|goshfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:goshfagshësha|goshfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshfagrosha|goshfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshfagmusha|goshfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshfagyasha|goshfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogoshfagnkshësha|gogoshfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogoshfagnkrosha|gogoshfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogoshfagnkmusha|gogoshfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogoshfagnkyasha|gogoshfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
